summary: Glassworks of Correspondence is a MuranoOS room handoff for managing metaphor, allegory, correspondence, and interpretive transfer.
final_use_case: It matters because sophisticated writing and analysis often depend on transfer; this room makes the transfer conditions and risks visible.

instruments.instrument_name: Glassworks of Correspondence Data Schema And Persistence Plan
instruments.input: entities, records, IDs, tables, JSON structures, indexes, and state transitions
instruments.operation: Writing, rhetoric, narrative design, visual culture, and presentation. Use source library writing/visual/cinema sources to strengthen public exposition and Trilogy visual/storytelling logic. Vision: Make public pages read as curated intellectual exhibits rather than dashboards. Mechanism: Extract narrative sequencing, visual perception, close reading, rhetoric, style, cinema, and presentation mechanisms. Plan: Apply after domain-source routing so style clarifies evidence rather than masking weak evidence. Status.
